[usb] pm3 --> hf search -h
Will try to find a HF read out of the unknown tag.

usage:
    hf search [-hv]

options:
    -h, --help                     This help
    -v, --verbose                  verbose output

[usb] pm3 --> lf search -h
Read and search for valid known tag. For offline mode, you can `data load` first then search.

usage:
    lf search [-h1cu]

options:
    -h, --help                     This help
    -u                             Search for unknown tags

[usb] pm3 --> lf hitag hts
help             This help
list             List Hitag S trace history
rdbl             Read Hitag S page
dump             Dump Hitag S pages to a file
restore          Restore Hitag S memory from dump file
wrbl             Write Hitag S page
sim              Simulate Hitag S transponder

[usb] pm3 --> lf hitag hts rdbl -p 0 -c 8
[=] Access Hitag S in Plain mode

[=] --- Tag Information ---------------------------
[=]  Memory type...... Hitag S 256
[=]  Authenticaion.... No
[=]  TTF coding....... Manchester
[=]  TTF data rate.... 2 kBit
[=]  TTF mode......... Page 4, Page 5, Page 6, Page 7
[=]  Config locked.... No
[=]  Key/PWD locked... No

[=]   # | 00 01 02 03 | ascii | perm | info

[+]   3 | 54 45 53 54 | TEST  | RW   | Data
